fields.name: total_due
fields.db_type: NUMERIC(15,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (tax_amount + penalties + interest) STORED

fields.name: balance_due
fields.db_type: NUMERIC(15,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (tax_amount + penalties + interest - amount_paid) STORED

endpoints.description: Batch link tax records to filing
List tax records, filterable by period/type/direction

events.description: Emitted 7 days before filing due date
Emitted when a new tax record is created

flows.name: Calculate Taxes for Period
steps: GET /tax-records/summary?period=&jurisdiction= to retrieve aggregated collected/paid amounts by rate
cross_entity_updates: TaxRecord.filing_id set for all included records

flows.name: Generate Filing
steps: Validate all records included and all periods covered
journal_entry_side_effects: DR Tax Payable / CR Bank on tax payment

flows.name: Record Tax Payment
steps: If amount_paid >= total_due: set filing status to complete

flows.name: Handle Tax Exemption
steps: If exempt: zero out tax on invoice/bill
Create TaxRecord with tax_amount=0, note exemption certificate

domain_rules.rule: Filed filings cannot be edited; they must be amended
domain_rules.api_guard: Check status !== 'filed' before allowing PATCH; return 409 if filed
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable all form fields and show Amend button when status=filed

domain_rules.rule: Tax records included in a filed filing cannot be removed from it
domain_rules.api_guard: Check filing.status !== 'filed' before allowing record removal

domain_rules.rule: Tax exemption valid_from must be <= today to be considered active
domain_rules.api_guard: Filter exemptions where valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE when checking active status

domain_rules.rule: Overdue filings get penalty and interest auto-calculated via background job
domain_rules.api_guard: Background job runs nightly; sets status=overdue and updates penalties/interest

domain_rules.rule: Tax payment amount cannot exceed filing.balance_due
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate payment.amount <= filing.balance_due; return 422 if exceeded
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show warning and cap input at balance_due

domain_rules.rule: Tax rate code must be unique within org

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
